predicates.name: is_surviving_spouse_of
predicates.description: The first person is the surviving spouse of the second person.

predicates.name: leaves_behind_adopted_children
predicates.description: The person leaves behind adopted children.

predicates.name: leaves_behind_descendants_of_adopted_children
predicates.description: The person leaves behind descendants of their adopted children.

predicates.name: leaves_behind_relevant_offspring
predicates.description: The person leaves behind descendants, adopted children, or descendants of adopted children.

predicates.name: acquires_usufruct_of_entire_estate
predicates.description: The first person acquires the usufruct of the entire estate of the second person.
